PHISHING.name: Phishing Attack
PHISHING.description: Attempt to steal sensitive information by disguising as a trustworthy entity

SCAM.name: Financial Scam
SCAM.description: Fraudulent scheme designed to steal money or financial information

IMPERSONATION.name: Impersonation
IMPERSONATION.description: Someone pretending to be a trusted person, company, or authority

DEEPFAKE.name: Deepfake Content
DEEPFAKE.description: AI-generated or manipulated media designed to deceive

SOCIAL_ENGINEERING.name: Social Engineering
SOCIAL_ENGINEERING.description: Psychological manipulation to trick users into making security mistakes

SPAM.name: Spam / Unwanted
SPAM.description: Unsolicited messages, often used to distribute scams at scale

MODERATION.name: Content Moderation
MODERATION.description: Content flagged for violent, explicit, or restricted material

SAFE.name: Safe Content
SAFE.description: No threats detected in the analyzed content
